commands.name: serve
commands.description:
Start trell as a server, accepting commands via 
gRPC

commands.name: run

options.name: -n
options.description:
Number of times to execute the code on the
server

options.name: --handler
options.description:
Specifies which worker handler function to call: scheduled,
fetch, or upload

options.name: --user-id
options.description:
User id to send in work order; also used for worker id
resolution

commands.description: Run scripts, directories, or workers (by id).

commands.name: worker

arguments.name: worker-id
arguments.description: Worker id to tell the server to execute

commands.description:
Runs the named worker code stored in the server's 
data

examples: run file worker.js --handler cron run dir my-worker-dir --handler webhook run worker-id worker-123 --handler upload
